Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start &Imagem.Title = 'IMG' Form.HeaderRawHTML = '' RetornaAutorizacao.Call('WWPEDIDOCOMPRA', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1, &AutNivCompra) retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWTABELAPRECOPRODUTO', Status_SimNao.Sim,1, &AutNiv) LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod RetornaEmpresaModulo.Call(&EmpCod, modulosistema.INDAGRIL, &INDAGRIL) &MaisCodigos.Visible = (&INDAGRIL='S') RetornaTabelaFilial.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, &TabCod) &OldTabCod = &TabCod TbPrecificacao.Visible = 0 PadraoUsuarioHora.Call('L', 'WWTABELAPRECO_VENCIMENTO', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'P') &PedDtaVct.FromString(&PadObs) &DisplayPedDtaVct = &PedDtaVct PadraoUsuarioHora.Call('L', 'WWTABELAPRECO_OCULTARCUSTOS', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'P') &IsOcultarCustos = iif(&PadObs = 'N' or &PadObs.IsEmpty(), false, true) //Visualizar custos &IsOcultarCustos.Visible = iif(&AutNivCompra > 0, true, false) //Autorizado ver custos /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Cell_Grid_DWC.Class = !'Invisible WCD_' + upper(Grid.InternalName) &OldTabCod.Visible = False &TabIsAntAcr.Visible = False &PedDtaVct.Visible = False Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARNOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MARNOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MARNOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &ExppData = new() If (&SalvarFiltro = false) &ExppDataItem = new() &ExppDataItem.Title = 'Salvar Filtros' &ExppDataItem.Icon = ActionManageFilters.Link() &ExppDataItem.EventKey = !'SalvaFiltros' &ExppDataItem.IsDivider = False &ExppData.Add(&ExppDataItem) Endif If (&SalvarFiltro = true) &ExppDataItem = new() &ExppDataItem.Title = 'Não Salvar Filtros' &ExppDataItem.Icon = ActionCleanFilters.Link() &ExppDataItem.EventKey = !'NaoSalvar' &ExppDataItem.IsDivider = False &ExppData.Add(&ExppDataItem) Endif If &ExppData.Count = 0 ddo_Expp.Visible = False EndIf &ProSts = nullvalue(&ProSts) Form.Caption = ' Tabela Preco Produto' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Do 'VerificaTabela' &ProNom.SetFocus() EndEvent Event Refresh if &Context.EmpCod = 0 or &Context.PesCod = 0 LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) EndIf Do 'loadColunas' // para atualizar o nome das colunas Do 'loadPadrao' //carrega padrao usuario das colunas TabPrc1.Visible = false TabPrc2.Visible = false TabPrc3.Visible = false TabPrc4.Visible = false TabPrc5.Visible = false TabPrc6.Visible = false TabPrc7.Visible = false TabPrc8.Visible = false TabPrc9.Visible = false &gridMarNom.Visible = false &gridNcmCod.Visible = false &gridProPesLiqPrd.Visible = false &gridProGraBar.Visible = false &gridProGraEstLoc.Visible = false &gridProGraEstQtdVarchar.Visible = false &gridProVlrCus.Visible = false &AcrescimoVarchar.Visible = false /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &ActionSelecione.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWActionColumn' &Imagem.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWIconActionColumn' &DetailWebComponent.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWIconActionColumn WCD_ActionColumn' &MaisCodigos.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &gridProGraBar.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &gridProGraRef.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &gridProNomGra.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &gridNcmCod.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &gridMarNom.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' TabPrc1.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &TabPrcPrecificado.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' TabPrc2.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' TabPrc3.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' TabPrc4.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' TabPrc5.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' TabPrc6.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' TabPrc7.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' TabPrc8.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' TabPrc9.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &gridProGraEstLoc.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &gridProGraEstQtdVarchar.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &gridProGraEstSdoVarchar.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &gridProPesLiqPrd.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &VolumeEmbalagem.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' GrupHie.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ TabPrc1.Visible = &SDT_wwTabelaPrecoProduto.IsCol1 = true and &sdtColunasTabela.Tem1 = true TabPrc1.Title = &sdtColunasTabela.TabColNom1 TabPrc2.Visible = &SDT_wwTabelaPrecoProduto.IsCol2 = true and &sdtColunasTabela.Tem2 = true TabPrc2.Title = &sdtColunasTabela.TabColNom2 TabPrc3.Visible = &SDT_wwTabelaPrecoProduto.IsCol3 = true and &sdtColunasTabela.Tem3 = true TabPrc3.Title = &sdtColunasTabela.TabColNom3 TabPrc4.Visible = &SDT_wwTabelaPrecoProduto.IsCol4 = true and &sdtColunasTabela.Tem4 = true TabPrc4.Title = &sdtColunasTabela.TabColNom4 TabPrc5.Visible = &SDT_wwTabelaPrecoProduto.IsCol5 = true and &sdtColunasTabela.Tem5 = true TabPrc5.Title = &sdtColunasTabela.TabColNom5 TabPrc6.Visible = &SDT_wwTabelaPrecoProduto.IsCol6 = true and &sdtColunasTabela.Tem6 = true TabPrc6.Title = &sdtColunasTabela.TabColNom6 TabPrc7.Visible = &SDT_wwTabelaPrecoProduto.IsCol7 = true and &sdtColunasTabela.Tem7 = true TabPrc7.Title = &sdtColunasTabela.TabColNom7 TabPrc8.Visible = &SDT_wwTabelaPrecoProduto.IsCol8 = true and &sdtColunasTabela.Tem8 = true TabPrc8.Title = &sdtColunasTabela.TabColNom8 TabPrc9.Visible = &SDT_wwTabelaPrecoProduto.IsCol9 = true and &sdtColunasTabela.Tem9 = true TabPrc9.Title = &sdtColunasTabela.TabColNom9 &TabPrcPrecificado.Visible = &TabIsAntAcr If not &DisplayPedDtaVct.IsEmpty() and &TabIsAntAcr = true &TabPrcPrecificado.Title = 'Vcto '+&DisplayPedDtaVct.ToFormattedString() else &TabPrcPrecificado.Title = 'Vcto '+&Today.ToFormattedString() EndIf &gridMarNom.Visible = &SDT_wwTabelaPrecoProduto.IsMarNom &gridNcmCod.Visible = &sdT_wwTabelaPrecoProduto.IsNcmCod &gridProPesLiqPrd.Visible = &SDT_wwTabelaPrecoProduto.IsProPesLiqPrd &gridProGraBar.Visible = &SDT_wwTabelaPrecoProduto.IsProGraBar &gridProGraEstLoc.Visible = &SDT_wwTabelaPrecoProduto.IsProGraEstLoc &gridProGraEstQtdVarchar.Visible = &SDT_wwTabelaPrecoProduto.IsProGraEstQtd &VolumeEmbalagem.Visible = &SDT_wwTabelaPrecoProduto.IsEmbVol GrupHie.Visible = &SDT_wwTabelaPrecoProduto.IsGrupCod &gridProGraEstSdoVarchar.Visible = &SDT_wwTabelaPrecoProduto.IsProGraEstSdo if &AutNivCompra >= 1 and &IsOcultarCustos = false//and &SDT_wwTabelaPrecoProduto.IsproVlrCus = true &gridProVlrCus.Visible = &SDT_wwTabelaPrecoProduto.IsproVlrCus &AcrescimoVarchar.Visible = &SDT_wwTabelaPrecoProduto.IsMargemLuc EndIf if &INDAGRIL='S' &MaisCodigos.Visible = 1 &gridProGraBar.Visible = 0 &gridProGraRef.Visible = 0 Else &MaisCodigos.Visible = 0 Endif Do 'loadSelecionados' //carrega sdt no padrao usuario EndEvent Event Grid.Load &gridProGraEstQtdVarchar.LinkTarget = '_blank' &gridProGraEstQtdVarchar.Link = wpconsultaestoque.Link(ProCod) &gridProGraRef.TooltipText = ProBarRef_Comp /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) &ActionSelecione.TooltipText = "" &Imagem = !'' &DetailWebComponent = !'' &gridProGraBar = ProGraBar &gridProGraRef = ProGraRef &gridProNomGra = ProNomGra &gridNcmCod = NcmCod &gridMarNom = MarNom &gridSetNom = ProSetNom &TabPrcPrecificado = TabPrc1 if (TabPerAcr > 0 or TabPerAnt > 0) and (TabIsAntAcr = true) and (not &PedDtaVct.IsEmpty() and TabDtaVct <> &PedDtaVct) and &TabIsAntAcr = true retornaUnitarioLiquidoAntecipado.Call(TabPerAcr, TabPerAnt, TabDtaVct, &DataVazia,&PedDtaVct, &TabPrcPrecificado) &TabPrcPrecificado.TooltipText = 'Precificado em: '+trim(TabPerAcr.ToFormattedString()) Endif &gridProGraEstLoc = ProGraEstLoc &gridProGraEstQtdVarchar = trim(toformattedString(ProGraEstQtd)) RetiraZerosDepoisVirgula.Call(&gridProGraEstQtdVarchar, &gridProGraEstQtdVarchar ) &gridProGraEstSdoVarchar = trim(toformattedString(ProGraEstSdo)) RetiraZerosDepoisVirgula.Call(&gridProGraEstSdoVarchar, &gridProGraEstSdoVarchar ) &varchar = trim(toformattedString(ProPesLiqPrd)) &gridProPesLiqPrd = RetiraZerosDepoisVirgula.Udp(&Varchar) + 'kg' &VolumeEmbalagem = 'EMB:' + trim(toformattedString(ProQtdEmb)) + ' / VOL:' + trim(toformattedString(ProQtdVol)) &gridProVlrCus = trim(toformattedString(ProVlrCus)) &gridProVlrCus = RetiraZerosDepoisVirgulaxCasas.Udp(2, &gridProVlrCus) &gridProCod = ProCod &gridProGraCod = ProGraCod If ProCod <> ProEstProCod &ActionSelecione.ColumnClass = !'WWActionColumn WWColumnInfo WWColumnInfoFirstColumn' &Imagem.ColumnClass = !'WWIconActionColumn WWColumnInfo' &DetailWebComponent.ColumnClass = !'WWIconActionColumn WCD_ActionColumn WWColumnInfo' &MaisCodigos.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' &gridProGraBar.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' &gridProGraRef.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' &gridProNomGra.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' &gridNcmCod.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' &gridMarNom.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' TabPrc1.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' &TabPrcPrecificado.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' TabPrc2.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo hidden-xs' TabPrc3.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo hidden-xs' TabPrc4.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo hidden-xs' TabPrc5.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo hidden-xs' TabPrc6.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' TabPrc7.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' TabPrc8.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' TabPrc9.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' &gridProGraEstLoc.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' &gridProGraEstQtdVarchar.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' &gridProGraEstSdoVarchar.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' &gridProPesLiqPrd.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' &VolumeEmbalagem.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' GrupHie.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' Else &ActionSelecione.ColumnClass = 'WWActionColumn' &Imagem.ColumnClass = 'WWIconActionColumn' &DetailWebComponent.ColumnClass = 'WWIconActionColumn WCD_ActionColumn' &MaisCodigos.ColumnClass = iif(ProSts <> Status_Produto.ATIVO, !'WWColumn WWColumnDanger WWColumnDangerSingleCell', !'WWColumn') &gridProGraBar.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' &gridProGraRef.ColumnClass = iif(ProSts <> Status_Produto.ATIVO, !'WWColumn WWColumnDanger WWColumnDangerSingleCell', !'WWColumn') &gridProNomGra.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' &gridNcmCod.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' &gridMarNom.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' TabPrc1.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' &TabPrcPrecificado.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' TabPrc2.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' TabPrc3.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' TabPrc4.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' TabPrc5.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' TabPrc6.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' TabPrc7.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' TabPrc8.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' TabPrc9.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' &gridProGraEstLoc.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' &gridProGraEstQtdVarchar.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' &gridProGraEstSdoVarchar.ColumnClass = iif(ProGraEstSdo <= 0 , !'WWColumn WWColumnDanger WWColumnDangerSingleCell', !'WWColumn') &gridProPesLiqPrd.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' &VolumeEmbalagem.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' GrupHie.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &AcrescimoVarchar = '---' if &SDT_wwTabelaPrecoProduto.IsMargemLuc = true and ProVlrCus > 0 and TabPrc1 > 0 &PercentualVenda = round((TabPrc1/ProVlrCus) * 100, 1) -100 &AcrescimoVarchar = trim(toformattedString(&PercentualVenda)) + '%' Do Case CAse &PercentualVenda < 0 &AcrescimoVarchar.ForeColor = RGB(255,0,0) Case &PercentualVenda < GrupPerAcr &AcrescimoVarchar.ForeColor = RGB(255,150,0) Otherwise &AcrescimoVarchar.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) EndCAse Endif retornaTemImagem.Call(EmpCod, ProCod, &ClasseImagemMensagem, &tooltipMensagem) &Imagem = &ClasseImagemMensagem //!'' &Imagem.TooltipText = &tooltipMensagem //= 'Possui Imagem' &gridProGraEstQtdVarchar.TooltipText = '' &AuxProCod = ProCod &AuxProGraCod = ProGraCod Do 'IsSelecionado' if ProCod <> ProEstProCod &gridProGraEstQtdVarchar.TooltipText = 'Estoque de Outro Produto' Endif &gridProNomGra.Link = VerProduto.Link('WWTABELAPRECOPRODUTO', EmpCod, ProCod) &gridProNomGra.LinkTarget = '_blank' if &INDAGRIL='S' &MaisCodigos.Clear() &ProCod = ProCod &ProGraCod = ProGraCod &gridProGraRef = ProGraRef do 'MontaComboFabricante' // &MaisCodigos = &AuxProBarRef Endif EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoParcelamento' wpPrazoColunas.Popup(&TabCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoPDF' if &sdtTabelaPrecoProduto.Count > 0 Do 'GravaSelecionadas' wpRelatorioTabelaPreco.Popup(&TabCod,&PedDtaVct) Refresh else msg('Você deve selecionar no mínimo 01 produto para gerar o arquivo PDF.') EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoColunas' wpColunas_TabelaPrecoProdutos.Popup(&TabCod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoMarcar' Do 'MarcaDesmarca' do 'Totaliza' Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event ddo_Expp.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case ddo_Expp.ActiveEventKey = !'SalvaFiltros' Do 'Do SalvaFiltros' Case ddo_Expp.ActiveEventKey = !'NaoSalvar' Do 'Do NaoSalvar' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoAjuda' innewWindow.Target = 'https://ajuda.jaspi.com.br/index.aspx?2cc92644-5b20-4f94-85b9-8bc87879422b' inNewWindow.Name = '_blank' innewWindow.OpenWindow() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DetailWebComponent.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid_DWC.Object = wcDetalhamentoProduto.Create(EmpCod, ProCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &MarNom1.Visible = False &ProBar1.Visible = False &TabPrc11.Visible = False &ProDtaCad1.Visible = False &GrupCod1.Visible = False &ProSetCod1.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROBAR' &ProBar1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'TABPRC1' &TabPrc11.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PRODTACAD' &ProDtaCad1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'GRUPCOD' &GrupCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROSETCOD' &ProSetCod1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &MarNom2.Visible = False &ProBar2.Visible = False &TabPrc12.Visible = False &ProDtaCad2.Visible = False &GrupCod2.Visible = False &ProSetCod2.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROBAR' &ProBar2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'TABPRC1' &TabPrc12.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PRODTACAD' &ProDtaCad2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'GRUPCOD' &GrupCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROSETCOD' &ProSetCod2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &MarNom3.Visible = False &ProBar3.Visible = False &TabPrc13.Visible = False &ProDtaCad3.Visible = False &GrupCod3.Visible = False &ProSetCod3.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROBAR' &ProBar3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'TABPRC1' &TabPrc13.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PRODTACAD' &ProDtaCad3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'GRUPCOD' &GrupCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROSETCOD' &ProSetCod3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do SalvaFiltros' saveColumnsSelectorState.Call('FLT#WWTabelaPrecoProdutoColumnsSelector', '1') wwcliente.Link() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do NaoSalvar' saveColumnsSelectorState.Call('FLT#WWTabelaPrecoProdutoColumnsSelector', '2') wwCliente.Link() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' If 1=2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PRONOM" &ProNom.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROGRAREF" &ProGraRef.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROSTS" &ProSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROGRAESTSDO" &ProGraEstSdo.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"TABCOD" &TabCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"TABULTALT" &TabUltAlt.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROISGRA" &ProIsGra.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Else &ChaveVarchar = &PgmName + !"GridState"+trim(Str(&Context.FilCod)) &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&ChaveVarchar)) If &GridState.FilterValues.Count = 0 &ChaveVarchar = &PgmName + !"GridState" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&ChaveVarchar)) Endif For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PRONOM" &ProNom.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROGRAREF" &ProGraRef.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROSTS" &ProSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"TABCOD" &TabCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROGRAESTSDO" &ProGraEstSdo.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"TABULTALT" &TabUltAlt.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"MARNOM" &MarNom.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROISGRA" &ProIsGra.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' EndIf EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROBAR' &ProBar1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'TABPRC1' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &TabPrc11.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PRODTACAD' &ProDtaCad1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'GRUPCOD' &GrupCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROSETCOD' &ProSetCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' &FiltroKey = 'FLT#WWTabelaPrecoProdutoColumnsSelector' &UmZero = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(&FiltroKey) Do CAse Case &UmZero = '2' &SalvarFiltro = false Case &UmZero = '1' &SalvarFiltro = true Otherwise RetornaConfUsuario.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.PesCod, domConfUsuario.Uconf001_PadraoFiltro, &UmZero) if &UmZero = '2' &SalvarFiltro = false Else &SalvarFiltro = true EndiF EndCase if &SalvarFiltro = true and &IstabelaFilial = true &ChaveVarchar = &PgmName + !"GridState"+trim(Str(&Context.FilCod)) //&GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&ChaveVarchar)) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PRONOM", "", not &ProNom.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProNom, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROGRAREF", "", not &ProGraRef.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProGraRef, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROSTS", "", not &ProSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"TABCOD", "", not &TabCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &TabCod, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROGRAESTSDO", "", not &ProGraEstSdo.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProGraEstSdo, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"TABULTALT", "", not &TabUltAlt.IsEmpty(), 0, &TabUltAlt.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"MARNOM", "", not &MarNom.IsEmpty(), 0, &MarNom, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROISGRA", "", not &ProIsGra.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProIsGra.ToString().Trim(), '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' SaveGridState.Call(&ChaveVarchar, &GridState.ToXml()) EndiF If 1=2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PRONOM", "", not &ProNom.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProNom, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROGRAREF", "", not &ProGraRef.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProGraRef, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROSTS", "", not &ProSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROGRAESTSDO", "", not &ProGraEstSdo.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProGraEstSdo, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"TABCOD", "", not &TabCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &TabCod, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"TABULTALT", "", not &TabUltAlt.IsEmpty(), 0, &TabUltAlt.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROISGRA", "", not &ProIsGra.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProIsGra.ToString().Trim(), '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndiF EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARNOM' AND not &MarNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MarNom1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROBAR' AND not &ProBar1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProBar1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'TABPRC1' AND not &TabPrc11.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &TabPrc11.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator1 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PRODTACAD' AND not &ProDtaCad1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProDtaCad1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'GRUPCOD' AND not &GrupCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &GrupCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROSETCOD' AND not &ProSetCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProSetCod1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MARNOM' AND not &MarNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MarNom2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROBAR' AND not &ProBar2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProBar2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'TABPRC1' AND not &TabPrc12.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &TabPrc12.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator2 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PRODTACAD' AND not &ProDtaCad2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProDtaCad2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'GRUPCOD' AND not &GrupCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &GrupCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROSETCOD' AND not &ProSetCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProSetCod2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MARNOM' AND not &MarNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MarNom3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROBAR' AND not &ProBar3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProBar3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'TABPRC1' AND not &TabPrc13.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &TabPrc13.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator3 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PRODTACAD' AND not &ProDtaCad3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProDtaCad3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'GRUPCOD' AND not &GrupCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &GrupCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROSETCOD' AND not &ProSetCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProSetCod3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"TabelaPrecoProduto" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &IsOcultarCustos.Click &PadObs = iif(&IsOcultarCustos = true, 'S', 'N') PadraoUsuarioHora.Call('G', 'WWTABELAPRECO_OCULTARCUSTOS', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMOd, 'P') EndEvent Event &ProGraRef.IsValid &ProBarRef_Comp = ';' + &ProGraRef.Trim() + ';' EndEvent Event &DisplayPedDtaVct.IsValid do 'ValidaDataPrecificacao' EndEvent Event &DisplayPedDtaVct.ControlValueChanged do 'ValidaDataPrecificacao' EndEvent Event 'DoExcel' if &sdtTabelaPrecoProduto.Count > 0 if not &TabCod.IsEmpty() Do 'GravaSelecionadas' wpRelatorioTabelaPreco.Popup(&TabCod,&PedDtaVct) Refresh else msg('Você deve informar a Tabela!') &TabCod.SetFocus() EndIf else msg('Você deve selecionar no mínimo 01 produto para gerar o arquivo Excel.') EndIf EndEvent Event &TabCod.IsValid Do 'VerificaTabela' if &OldTabCod <> &TabCod Refresh &OldTabCod = &TabCod Endif EndEvent Event limpar_campo.Click &sdtTabelaPrecoProduto.Clear() do 'GravaSelecionadas' Refresh EndEvent Event &Imagem.Click wwImagemProduto.Popup(ProCod) EndEvent Event &ActionSelecione.Click do 'selecionar' EndEvent Event &TabPrcPrecificado.Click // If &TabIsAntAcr = true essa coluna ja é so para prescificado WpCalculaPrecificacao.Popup(EmpCod,TabCod,ProCod,ProGraCod,TabAltCod,&DisplayPedDtaVct) // EndIf EndEvent Event &gridProGraEstLoc.Click LocacaoProduto.Popup(true, &gridProCod) Refresh keep EndEvent Sub 'MontaComboFabricante' &isAchou = false For Each Order EmpCod, ProCod, ProGraCod, ProBarOrd, ProBarRef Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where ProCod = &ProCod Where ProGraCod = &ProGraCod Where ProBarTip = 'A' or ProBarTip = 'R' or ProBarTip = 'O' //CODIGOS AVULSOS ou Referencia RetornaNomeMarca.Call(EmpCod, ProBarMarCod, &AuxMarNom) &ProBarNom = ProBarRef.Trim() if not &AuxMarNom.IsEmpty() &ProBarNom += ' - ' + trim(&AuxMarNom) Endif &MaisCodigos.AddItem(ProBarRef, &ProBarNom) EndFor EndSub Sub 'Selecionar' &isAchou = false For &sdtTabelaPrecoProdutoItem in &sdtTabelaPrecoProduto if &sdtTabelaPrecoProdutoItem.C = &gridProCod and &sdtTabelaPrecoProdutoItem.G = &gridProGraCod &Isachou = true &index = &sdtTabelaPrecoProduto.IndexOf(&sdtTabelaPrecoProdutoItem) &sdtTabelaPrecoProduto.remove(&index) &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselOption) &Selecionado = '0' exit EndIf EndFor if &IsAchou = false &sdtTabelaPrecoProdutoItem = new() &sdtTabelaPrecoProdutoItem.C = &gridProCod &sdtTabelaPrecoProdutoItem.G = &gridProGraCod &sdtTabelaPrecoProduto.Add(&sdtTabelaPrecoProdutoItem) &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) &Selecionado = '1' Endif do 'GravaSelecionadas' EndSub Sub 'MarcaDesmarca' //TABELAPRECOPRODUTOS &sdtTabelaPrecoProduto.Clear() if &Context.EmpCod = 0 or &Context.PesCod =0 LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) EndIf Do case case &ProSts = Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO &AuxProSts = Status_Produto.ATIVO case &ProSts = Status_AtivoInativo.INATIVO &AuxProSts = Status_Produto.INATIVO otherwise &AuxProSts = nullvalue(&AuxProSts) EndCase RetornaSDTTabelaPreco.Call(&Context.EmpCod,&Context.PesCod,&ProNom, &ProGraRef, &AuxProSts, &TabCod, &ProGraEstSdo, &TabUltAlt, &ProIsGra, &DynamicFiltersSelector1, &DynamicFiltersOperator1, &MarNom1, &ProBar1, &TabPrc11, &ProDtaCad1,&GrupCod1,&ProSetCod1, &DynamicFiltersEnabled2, &DynamicFiltersSelector2, &DynamicFiltersOperator2,&MarNom2, &ProBar2, &TabPrc12, &ProDtaCad2, &GrupCod2,&ProSetCod2,&DynamicFiltersEnabled3, &DynamicFiltersSelector3, &DynamicFiltersOperator3,&MarNom3, &ProBar3, &TabPrc13, &ProDtaCad3,&GrupCod3,&ProSetCod3) EndSub Sub 'IsSelecionado' &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselOption) For &sdtTabelaPrecoProdutoItem in &sdtTabelaPrecoProduto if &sdtTabelaPrecoProdutoItem.C = &AuxProCod and &sdtTabelaPrecoProdutoItem.G = &AuxProGraCod &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) exit EndIf EndFor EndSub Sub 'GravaSelecionadas' PadraoUsuarioHora.Call('G', 'SEL_WWTabelaPrecoProduto', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &sdtTabelaPrecoProduto.ToJson(), &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMOd, 'P') do 'Totaliza' EndSub Sub 'Totaliza' &numeric = &sdtTabelaPrecoProduto.Count ProdutosSelect.Caption = trim(str(&numeric)) + ' - Produtos Selec.' EndSub Sub 'loadSelecionados' &sdtTabelaPrecoProduto.Clear() PadraoUsuarioHora.Call('L','SEL_WWTabelaPrecoProduto',&Context.PesCod,&Context.EmpCod,&PadObs,&PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMOd, 'P') &sdtTabelaPrecoProduto.FromJson(&PadObs) Do 'Totaliza' EndSub Sub 'loadColunas' RetornaColunas_Nome.Call(&EmpCod, &TabCod, &sdtColunasTabela) EndSub Sub 'VerificaTabela' &HojeData = Serverdate() &TabIsAntAcr = false TestaTabelaFilial.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, &TabCod, &TabIsAntAcr, &IstabelaFilial, &IsExisteTabela, &Mensagem) txtNomeTabela.Caption = &Mensagem if &IsExisteTabela = true Do 'loadColunas' Else &TabCod.SetEmpty() &TabCod.SetFocus() msg(&Mensagem) Endif TbPrecificacao.Visible = &TabIsAntAcr EndSub Sub 'ValidaDataPrecificacao' &HojeData = Serverdate() &MaximoData = &HojeData.AddDays(365) Do Case Case &DisplayPedDtaVct < &HojeData msg('Informado uma data inferior a Hoje!, não é permitido!') &PedDtaVct.SetEmpty() Case &DisplayPedDtaVct > &HojeData.AddDays(365) msg('Data máxima para precificação é de 365 dias futuros: ' + trim(toformattedString(&MaximoData))) &PedDtaVct.SetEmpty() Otherwise if &PedDtaVct <> &DisplayPedDtaVct &PedDtaVct = &DisplayPedDtaVct &PadObs = trim(toformattedString(&PedDtaVct)) PadraoUsuarioHora.Call('G', 'WWTABELAPRECO_VENCIMENTO', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMOd, 'P') Endif EndCase EndSub Sub 'loadPadrao' &PadObs.SetEmpty() PadraoUsuarioHora.Call('L','COL_WWTABELAPRECOPRODUTO',&Context.PesCod,&Context.EmpCod,&PadObs,&PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMOd, 'P') if &PadObs.IsEmpty() &SDT_wwTabelaPrecoProduto.IsCol1 = true &SDT_wwTabelaPrecoProduto.IsCol2 = true &SDT_wwTabelaPrecoProduto.IsMarNom = true &sdT_wwTabelaPrecoProduto.IsNcmCod = true &SDT_wwTabelaPrecoProduto.IsProGraBar = true &SDT_wwTabelaPrecoProduto.IsProGraEstLoc = true &SDT_wwTabelaPrecoProduto.IsProGraEstQtd = true &SDT_wwTabelaPrecoProduto.IsProGraEstSdo = true &PadObs = &SDT_wwTabelaPrecoProduto.ToJson() PadraoUsuarioHora.Call('G','COL_WWTABELAPRECOPRODUTO',&Context.PesCod,&Context.EmpCod,&PadObs,&PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMOd, 'P') endif &SDT_wwTabelaPrecoProduto.FromJson(&PadObs) EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
